name: Case Study Example
history: Multiple past jobs involved micromanagement. Reports self-blame in work contexts.
intermediate_belief: If I make a mistake, it proves I am not capable.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't handle work stress, and it will lead to failure.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of tasks and procrastination due to fear of making mistakes.
situation: Being blamed at work for spreadsheet errors that were not theirs.
auto_thought: I should have caught the mistake; now everyone thinks I'm incompetent.
behavior: Avoidance of taking on new tasks and reluctance to speak up in meetings.
